info.name: collarcheck
info.description:
### Welcome to Postman! This is your first collection. 

Collections are your starting point for building and testing APIs. You can use this one to:

• Group related requests
• Test your API in real-world scenarios
• Document and share your requests

Update the name and overview whenever you’re ready to make it yours.

[Learn more about Postman Collections.](https://learning.postman.com/docs/collections/collections-overview/)

request.description:
This is a GET request and it is used to "get" data from an endpoint. There is no request body for a GET request, but you can use query parameters to help specify the resource you want data on (e.g., in this request, we have `id=1`).

A successful GET response will have a `200 OK` status, and should include some kind of response body - for example, HTML web content or JSON data.

Job Summary<\/strong><\/h2>

We are seeking a QA Engineer who will be responsible for designing, executing, and maintaining test plans and test cases. The ideal candidate will work closely with developers, product managers, and other stakeholders to identify issues and ensure the delivery of high-quality software.<\/p>

Key Responsibilities<\/strong><\/h2>
  • Develop and execute manual and automated test cases.<\/li>
  • Create and maintain test plans, test scenarios, and test documentation.<\/li>
  • Identify, document, track, and verify software defects.<\/li>
  • Collaborate with developers to resolve issues and improve product quality.<\/li>
  • Participate in requirement reviews and provide feedback from a quality perspective.<\/li>
  • Perform functional, regression, integration, and performance testing.<\/li>
  • Contribute to continuous improvement of QA processes and testing standards.<\/li>
  • Ensure releases meet quality standards before deployment.<\/li><\/ul>","roles_responsibility":null,"department_name":"Software Testing","experience_name":"7-10 years","department":"72","experience":"7","skill":[{"id":"818","name":"API Testing"},{"id":"3789","name":"Defect Tracking"},{"id":"5158","name":"ETL Testing"},{"id":"9395","name":"Manual Testing"},{"id":"11724","name":"Performance Testing"},{"id":"15280","name":"Test Automation"},{"id":"17813","name":"Database Testing"},{"id":"17849","name":"Automation Testing"},{"id":"19117","name":"Agile Methodology"},{"id":"19273","name":"IoT Testing"}],"role_type_name":"Full Time","job_mode_name":"Hybrid","industry_name":"Quality Assurance","role_type":"1","industry":"343","vacancy":"8","urgent":true,"designation_name":"Qa\/qc engineer","country_name":"India","state_name":"Uttar Pradesh","designation":"1913","country":"101","state":"4022","city":"133230","job_mode":"3","document":"","city_name":"Noida","salary":"3","salary_name":"6-10 Lakhs","company_name":"Fluper Pvt.
